title: CEOs of the future without engineering — and the drug-creep self-warning
html:
CEOs of the future without engineering — and the drug-creep self-warning

Source: 2021-11-05 Apple Note. Two questions Yahir wants to ask somebody (interview? meetup? professor?), followed by a sharp self-directed paragraph about how habits creep — "You don't know what you have become until you have become it. Drugs, doesn't happened, then it starts and u forgot how it started" — and an explicit "Yeah you should probably stop drinking and smoking" to himself.

TL;DR

  • Frames a founder-thesis question: "Do you think CEOs of the future will be at a disadvantage if they are not engineers or don't have an understanding of technology?" — first explicit articulation in the corpus of the technical-CEO premise that later underwrites Yahir's Bromenu / Rankett / Brotein founder posture.
  • Pairs it with a college-advice question: "What is one thing you recommend we do in college" — Yahir setting up an interview prompt for someone he wanted to pump for upper-level perspective during freshman year at OSU.
  • Drops the corpus's clearest drug-creep self-warning: "You don't know what you have become until you have become it" — recognition that habit formation is invisible until it's already locked in.
  • Self-addresses in second person: "Yeah you should probably stop drinking and smoking. You kind of new past then" — predates the 2021 12 05 Mario Kart banana drugs thesis by one month, same arc.
  • Closes with a fragmented "Regulate try / Regular" — likely a half-typed reminder to himself about regulating the regularity of consumption.

Pattern observed

Note documents the Nov–Dec 2021 founder-thesis + drug-thesis double arc — Yahir is simultaneously sketching the technical-CEO premise that will define his next four years, and naming the thing that could derail it. The two questions at the top read like prep for a cold-outreach informational interview during OSU freshman year. Connects to 10x thinking, learn to run before flying, and the mentor-from-afar move.

Open questions

  • Who was Yahir prepping these two questions for? (Professor office hours? An OSIG-orbit upperclassman? A founder he was about to email?)
  • Did the drinking/smoking taper actually happen at this point or stay aspirational?

Related

  • 10x thinking
  • osu
  • corvallis crypto club

related.label: Hey Cameron — crypto follow-up + 'banana in Mario Kart' drugs thesis
